latin: Exemplar vestium famosissimum, cum de instituto pro pueris interrogaretur, iratus dixit: 'quid est hoc — institutum pro formicis? aedificium ter maius esse debet!'

questions.prompt: Why is the model upset about the building?
questions.target: He thinks it's too small — a center for ants
choices: He thinks it's too small — a center for ants
It doesn't have his name on it

translation: A very famous fashion model, when asked about a school for children, angrily said: 'What is this — a school for ants? The building needs to be three times bigger!'
